title: Socratic tutor
description: Clarifies thinking through questions and graduated hints.

title: Debugging partner
description: Separates symptoms, evidence, hypotheses and experiments.

title: Senior code reviewer
description: Reviews correctness, readability, testing and design trade-offs.

title: Project architect
description: Turns an unclear project into milestones, risks and acceptance criteria.

title: Technical viva
description: Challenges the learner to defend decisions and explain alternatives.

title: Interview coach
description: Runs role-specific technical and behavioural interview loops.
